[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0100100 2
4 0000001 1
5 0110100 3
6 0001001 2
7 1100001 3

01 10 0000000 a match 0 1 2
12 21 0000001 1 match 4
23 32 1000000 1
34 43 1001100 3
45 54 0001010 2
56 65 0000001 1 match 4
67 76 0000101 2
70 07 0010100 2

02 20 0100000 1
13 31 0001000 1
24 42 1000000 1
35 53 0001000 1
46 64 0000100 1
57 75 0000001 1 match 4
60 06 0100100 2 match 3
71 17 0000001 1 match 4

14 41 0001000 1
25 52 0000001 1 match 4
36 63 0000100 1
47 74 0000100 1
50 05 0000000 a match 0 1 2
61 16 0000001 1 match 4
72 27 0000001 1 match 4

15 51 0001001 2 match 6
26 62 0100001 2
37 73 0010100 2
